title: British Crock Pot Beef Stew
description: A hearty, comforting British-inspired beef stew cooked to perfection in a crock pot. Serve with crusty bread for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter. Once melted, add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
In a crock pot, combine the cooked beef, onion and garlic mixture, chopped carrots and potatoes, beef broth, and flour.
Stir to combine and cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 4-6 hours.
About 30 minutes before serving, add the crumbly British biscuits to the crock pot and stir to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: serve with crusty bread for dipping in the stew.
